scene_attributes: two windows with blinds and curtains flanking fireplace
wooden side table with small decor
payload.additional_notes: Camera faces the main wall with a fireplace and TV; two windows provide daylight. Small decorative items on mantel and side table. Leather seating occupies left and right foreground.
payload.image_summary: Living room shot centered on a white mantel fireplace with a wall-mounted television above, flanked by two windows with blinds and curtains. Leather recliner on left and a leather couch on right with a wooden side table between. Potted plant on the mantel and a small rug at the hearth.
